raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht runnaja tee us to
Kehnixu no Affirijas / un fazzija:
Tee Pagant/ ko tu effi ais-
weddïs/ un lizzis Samarijas
Pilsfahtös dsihwoht/ ne finna to
Teesfu ta Deewa tahs paschas
Semmes/ tadeht irr wiꞥsch starp
teem Lauwas fuhtijs/ un raugi/
tee nokauj tohs/ tapehz ka tee to
Teesfu ta Deewa tahs Semmes
ne finna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad pawehleja tas Keh-
nixsch no Affirijas / fazzidans:
Noweddeet us turren weenu no
teem Preestereem/ ko juhs no tur-
renes effat aiswedduschi/ ka tee
staiga / un tur dsihwo/ un to
Teesfu ta Deewa tahs Semmes
mahza.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta nahze weens no teem
Preestereem/ kas no Samarijas
bija aiswesti/ un dsihwoja Be-
telê/ un mahzija tohs / ka bij to
KUNGU bihteês.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ikkurra Tauta dar-
rija jew paschai Deewus/ un us
zehle tohs Augstumu Nammoês/
ko tee no Samarijas bij darri-
schi/ ikkurra Tauta fawds Pils-
fahftös/ kur tee dsihwoja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tee Laudis no Babe-
les darrija Sukot-Benotn / un
tee Laudis no Kutas darrija
Nergelu/un tee Laudis no Eema-
ta darrija Asimu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Awitert darrija
Niveafu / un Tartaku/ un tee
Sewarwitert fadedsinaja favus
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Dehtns tan Adramelekam un
Anamelekam/ teem Deeweem no
Sewarwaim ar Ugguni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee bihjajahs arridsan
to KUNGU / un darrija few
Preesterus no teem wiſſsemuna-
keem Laudim/ kas preekſch teem
Augstumu Nammoês to Darbu
darrija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee bihjajahs to KUN-
GU/ un kalpoja arridsan fatweem
Deeweem/ pehz ikkurras Tautas
Teesfu/ no kurrenes tee bija ais-
westi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un lihds fchai paschai
Deenai darra tee pehz to pirmu
Eeraddumu/ ka tee neds to KUN-
GU bibstahs / neds darra pehz
winnu Likkumeem / un pehz
winnu Teesjahm / neds pehz tahs
Bauslibas/ neds pehz to Baufli/
ko tas KUNGGS Zehkaba Behr-
neem pawehleja/ kam winſch to
Wahrdu Israëls Deewe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tatschu bij tas KUNGGS
ar tecin weenu Derribu darrijs/
un teem pawehlejs / fazzidans:
Jums ne buhs zittus Deewus
bihtees/ neds preekſch teem klan-
nitees/ neds teem kalpoht / neds
teem uppureht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tam KUNGAM/
kas juhs no Egiptes- Semmes
isweddïsar leelu Spehku/ un is-
steeptu Elkonu / to buhs jums
bihtees/ un preekſch ta buhs jums
klannitees/ un tam buhs jums
uppureht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tohs Likkumus / un
tahs Teefas/ un to Bauslibu/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
